subcodes.first_line: The sun of divine decree hath risen from the horizon of Glory; blessed is he who hath been illumined by its rays, and verily the oceans [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد استشرقت شمس القضاء عن افق البهاء طوبی لمن استضاء بانوارها و قد تموجت بحور
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Greatest Name
